notes: WebFetch returned HTTP 403 for all sites — consistent with sandbox networking restrictions on the WebFetch proxy, not confirmed site outages. SSL certificate checks via Bash/openssl succeeded for all 8 sites (TLS handshake = indirect evidence sites are serving traffic). ALERT: All 8 SSL certs expire 2026-06-14 (29 days remaining, crossing the <30-day warning threshold). Certs appear to be on a shared renewal cycle; recommend verifying auto-renewal is configured on the Vercel/CDN side.
